title: Caching Strategy Overview
content: Three caching layers: 1) CDN (CloudFront) for static assets and product images — 24h TTL. 2) Redis in-memory cache for hot data — product details (5 min), category tree (1 hour), search results (2 min). 3) HTTP cache headers (ETag + Cache-Control) for API responses. Cache invalidation: write-through for product updates, event-based for inventory changes. Cache hit ratio target: >90% for product reads.
